description_long: This humanoid robot features a robust, dark metallic body with a broad, shield-like torso and a cylindrical head topped with a small red antenna. Its face is equipped with two large, round, blue-lit eyes and a smaller blue circle, giving it a distinctive, expressive appearance. The arms are flexible, ribbed tubes ending in mechanical hands with articulated fingers, while the legs are similarly ribbed and terminate in sturdy, mechanical feet. The chest displays a prominent blue circular element and a smaller red button, suggesting interactive or sensory functions. The robot stands on a set of interlocking, flat black plates that serve as its base. The overall design is industrial and functional, with a sleek, glossy finish and visible mechanical joints.
description: A dark, metallic humanoid robot with blue-lit eyes, ribbed flexible limbs, and a broad torso, standing on interlocking black plates. It features expressive facial elements and interactive chest components.
description_view_0: Front view shows the robot's expressive blue eyes, red and blue chest buttons, and detailed mechanical hands.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlights the ribbed arm and leg structure, the cylindrical head, and the back of the torso.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the smooth, unadorned back, ribbed limbs, and the interlocking base plates.
description_view_3: Side view displays the profile of the head, the protruding blue eye, and the flexible arm attachment.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both arms relaxed and slightly bent at the elbows, legs straight and feet planted firmly on the base, head facing forward.
attribute_clothing_style: Unclothed; exterior consists of integrated metallic and plastic panels with no additional coverings or decorative elements.
attribute_facial_features: Face features two large, round, blue-lit eyes, a smaller blue circle, and no visible mouth or nose; the head is topped with a small red antenna.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have visible ribbed segments suggesting flexible joints; hands have articulated fingers, and feet are solid and mechanical. Joints appear to allow for basic movement and grasping.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Visible sensors include two large blue-lit eyes on the head, likely functioning as cameras or visual sensors; no other sensors are clearly visible.
